info.name: Hawkit Detailed API Workflow
info.description:
A fully chained and parameterized collection for the Hawkit/Efluence API including success examples. 

**Workflow:**
1. Run **Login** (automatically sets `auth_token`).
2. Run **Generate Task** (automatically sets `task_id`).
3. Run **View Task** or **Submit Proof**.

exec: pm.test("Extract and set Auth Token", function () {
pm.test("User profile data is returned", function () {

response.name: Success

response.body:
{ "status": "success", "data": { "task": { "proof": {}, "pricing_title": { "buyer": "₦8 per Follow", "seller": "₦5 per Follow" }, "pricing": { "buyer": 8, "seller": 5, "referrer": 1 }, "_id": "69dd4075eaea0131f3668ffc", "userId": "69dd299abaa3bb6e1c276e61", "social_task_order": { "_id": "697622785fca27b76f6a899c", "platform": "instagram" }, "social_task_category": { "title": { "buyer": "Get Real People to Follow Your Page on Social Media", "seller": "Follow People & Pages" }, "pricing_title": { "buyer": "₦8 per Follow", "seller": "₦5 per Follow" }, "proof_of_work": { "title": "Social Media Username", "description": "Please enter the username of the social media account you used to perform the task e.g Instagram username, Twitter username, Tiktok username etc." }, "pricing": { "seller": 5 }, "_id": "630f312f7c7abf3078452626", "task_steps": "follow-task-steps.html", "is_upload": false, "type": "follow", "text": "Followers" }, "link": "https://www.instagram.com/de_nony2?igsh=MWYxcHZhNjk2amM1eg==", "status": "PENDING", "expires_on": "2026-04-13T20:13:57.540Z", "created_on": "2026-04-13T19:13:57.541Z", "__v": 0, "task_steps": "

The task you are given is to follow an account on social media pages e.g Instagram, Twitter or Tiktok.

Please follow the step-by-step instructions below to do your task:

Step 1: Open the Task Link above on your social media app e.g Instagram, Twitter or Tiktok.

Step 2: The link will direct you to a social media profile which you are meant to follow.

Step 3: Click on the Follow button to follow the given social media profile. You MUST NOT Unfollow the account after you have followed the account.

Step 4: Create a screenshot of the page that shows you are following the account and upload the screenshot under the Proof of Work Form below. You are also required to enter your social media account username (e.g Your Instagram, Twitter or Tiktok username) which you used to perform the task

You must NOT UNFOLLOW the account after you have followed the account. Your Hawkit account will be suspended once you UNFOLLOW the account. You will not be able to perform tasks anymore if you UNFOLLOW the account.
", "tasks_in_review": "
TASK IS BEING VERIFIED!

Thank you for performing this task. The owner of the task that assigned the task to you is currently verifying what you have done. Your money is currently pending until the task you have performed is confirmed and approved by the owner.

The owner of the task has to verify what you have done within the next 5 days. However, your task may be verified within 24 hours if you performed the task well and all task instructions are adhered to.

This approval process is very necessary in order to ensure that the task is properly carried out. If you didn't perform the task or you failed to follow all task instructions, you can still do the task and resubmit, otherwise, you will be PENALISED if you failed the task.

" } } }

formdata.description: Social media username used to perform the task
